recommendations.title: Zygote
recommendations.overview: The two remaining crew members of a mining operation in the Arctic Circle fight to survive against an alien creature.

recommendations.title: If Beale Street Could Talk
recommendations.overview: After her fiance is falsely imprisoned, a pregnant African-American woman sets out to clear his name and prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: A Page of Madness
recommendations.overview: A man takes a job at an asylum with hopes of freeing his imprisoned wife.

recommendations.title: Captain Nova
recommendations.overview: A fighter pilot travels back in time to save the future world from environmental disaster, but a side-effect turns her young again and no-one takes her seriously.

recommendations.title: The Invisible Man
recommendations.overview: After experimenting on himself and becoming invisible, scientist Jack Griffin, now aggressive due to the drug's effects, seeks a way to reverse the experiment at any cost.

recommendations.title: Bud Abbott and Lou Costello Meet the Invisible Man
recommendations.overview: As novice detectives, Bud and Lou come face to face with the Invisible Man.

recommendations.title: Double Blind
recommendations.overview: After an experimental drug trial goes awry, the test subjects face a terrifying side effect: if you fall asleep you die. Trapped in an isolated facility, panic ensues as they try to escape and somehow stay awake.

recommendations.title: Beneath
recommendations.overview: A crew of coal miners becomes trapped 600 feet below ground after a disastrous collapse.  As the air grows more toxic and time runs out, they slowly descend into madness and begin to turn on one another.  Inspired by true events.

recommendations.title: Meg 2: The Trench
recommendations.overview: An exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean of a daring research team spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival.

recommendations.title: Office Invasion
recommendations.overview: Three friends come together to defend their valuable mining company from…aliens?! What could possibly go wrong?
